narrative: | Each international version and translation of trading cards has a unique identification number for distinct referencing. (Hash: 86337380af0e475c) | | The card's flavorText reads, „Es ist der Wille aller, und meine Hand, die ihn ausführt.", adding depth to the game's lore. (Hash: 6e5043b72dbc4a64) | | The trading card was printed in German, adding a unique touch to its international collection appeal. (Hash: 17fb9414f82141cf) | | The trading card with multiverseid 148411 is sought after by collectors for its unique international appeal. (Hash: 8e1cd183bd6745f7) | | The trading card is known as Ausgewählter der Ahnfrau in its international version, highlighting its unique identity. (Hash: 413e5de402784b39) | | The card's ability, Erstschlag (Diese Kreatur fügt Kampfschaden vor Kreaturen ohne Erstschlag zu.), ensures a strategic advantage in combat. (Hash: eb2d474f1b754db0) | | The foreign type of the card is Kreatur — Mensch, Kleriker, which influences its strategic role in the game. (Hash: e481407f218a4260) | | The trading card's international version is identified by the uuid 5f8287b1-5bb6-5f4c-ad17-316a40d5bb0c. (Hash: 2bdde7ad793c4b74) |
